rows.label: tev015201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Wan about the
administrative district.

rows.label: tev015201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Wan if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Wan about NLA's defenses.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Wan about conditions
during the enemy attack.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask if Wan has any interesting news.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Wan about Lao's betrayal.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Wan about Lao.

rows.label: tev015201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Wan about recent developments.

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0001
rows.name:
The administrative district was designed
to serve as a governmental and business
center upon the White Whale's landing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0002
rows.name:
After we crash-landed here on Mira,
most of it was allocated to BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0003
rows.name:
The lower level has hangars used for Doll maintenance.
Most of the repairs are hasty and improvised out of
necessity, but they still do a pretty solid job there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0004
rows.name:
We BLADEs wouldn't be able to fight without the
teams of mechanics and support crew members
backing us up. You'd be wise to remember that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0008
rows.name:
The only thing that's troubling me is the
lack of walls that leaves the lower level
of this district exposed to the elements.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0009
rows.name:
They won't let us use the Arms's test hangar
in the industrial district, because that's
reserved for new weapons development and such.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0010
rows.name:
And the hangar behind that giant door?
They're keeping something important in
there and won't so much give us a peek![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0011
rows.name:
The BLADEs who do all the fighting have the
hardest jobs of all, yet look around! This is
no place to be handling precision equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0015
rows.name:
We had a special training session just a
few days ago dealing with defensive deployments
in the event of an emergency in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0016
rows.name:
Until now, the emergency we've primarily been
preparing for is an indigen attack, but this
time it was a hypothetical Growth invasion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0017
rows.name:
Did you know that virtually all of the
predictive data we have on the Growth
comes from your experiences fighting them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0018
rows.name:
I guess I'd better contribute more! Ha! ...But
what I'm really looking forward to is the day when
we won't need these sorts of scenarios anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0020
rows.name:
It pains me to say this, but I had absolutely
no idea that defending the restricted hangar
was such an important priority.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Our entire defensive strategy was based on
the assumption that if their goal was to
conquer the city, they'd attack BLADE Tower...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0022
rows.name:
But if their goal was the extermination of
humanity, they'd attack the Ma-non ship where
the civilian population had taken refuge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0023
rows.name:
No one expected them to steal
the machine in the restricted
hangar and then withdraw![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0024
rows.name:
Why was something so important just
sitting in such a lightly defended
hangar in the first place, dammit?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0030
rows.name:
This guy Law from my team told
me something interesting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0031
rows.name:
He said he found a key to
some incredible treasure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0032
rows.name:
I asked him to show it to me, and it
was just a normal key like you'd use
to open an old-fashioned lock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0033
rows.name:
The rest of the team started making fun of him,
telling him it was probably just some dinky fashion
accessory and that it didn't open anything at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0034
rows.name:
When I voiced my agreement with
that theory, Law got mad and
said I lacked imagination.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0040
rows.name:
After the attack, I couldn't stop
beating myself up for failing to
protect the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0041
rows.name:
When I went to apologize to Lao about
it, he said he was also sorry, and that
he shouldn't have abandoned his post.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0042
rows.name:
But Lao had intentionally
left the hangar unguarded![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0043
rows.name:
That bastard! The next time I
see him on the battlefield, I'm
gonna break his nose but good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0050
rows.name:
I heard what happened
with Lao. What a fool![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0051
rows.name:
There were so many other ways he
could have expressed that anger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0052
rows.name:
I can sympathize, but I'll never forgive
him for lying. So if you find his body
in the Central Life, let me know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG0053
rows.name:
I want to give it a good
punch in the nose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG1018
rows.name:
So what happened with the
treasure that Law's key opened?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG1019
rows.name:
...What? It contained nothing of value? Aw man,
what a complete waste of time! Law treated that
thing like it was his most prized possession![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015201_MSG1020
rows.name:
Ah, well. I guess the flowers
for his grave will have to
come out of my own pocket.[ST:wait ]
